note: Created tcp_connect_loopback.rs with 14 tests covering SocketManager-level and FFI-level TCP connect scenarios. Tests include: SYN-SENT state verification, SYN packet generation, full loopback three-way handshake completion, Established state assertions, external IP connect, FFI fd allocation, error handling (null/invalid address, invalid handle), connect+close lifecycle, and concurrent listen+connect on same device. All 14 tests pass.
